title: Header Icon Redesign: Profile, Share, Help, and Alerts
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the header to have distinct icons for profile, sharing, help, and alerts, so that each function is clearly identifiable at a glance.
description:
Redesign the header icon set for clearer function identification.

## Changes
- Replace the share icon with a green user profile icon (links to settings page)
- Add a new share icon next to the profile icon (links to settings page with #share anchor for future section)
- Help icon links to `https://datatoolspro.com/tutorials/#dtphelp`
- Alerts and Logout icons remain unchanged
acceptance_criteria: Green user profile icon appears in the header linking to settings
Share icon appears next to profile icon linking to settings#share
ux_changes: Header redesigned with distinct icons: green profile icon, share icon, help icon linking to tutorials, and unchanged alerts/logout.
implementation_notes: Share link uses #share anchor for a future settings section. Help link uses #dtphelp anchor on the tutorials page.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the changes and pushed to staging for review.
